_comment: Classification rules for selecting T1w + T2w-FLAIR series. Edit thresholds/tokens here without touching python. A series matches a modality if ANY rule block matches. Within a block, ALL conditions must hold. Rules are tried in order; first match wins.

common_gates._comment: Applied to ALL series before classification. Failing any gate = rejected.

T1w.name: Siemens_MPRAGE_by_sequence_name
T1w._comment: Siemens MPRAGE / MP2RAGE: SequenceName has tfl3d. Strongest fingerprint when present.

T1w.name: MPRAGE_by_timing
T1w._comment: Vendor-agnostic MPRAGE signature. Short TE + MPRAGE-style TI + GR/IR scanning.

T1w.name: GE_BRAVO_SPGR_by_sequence_name
T1w._comment: GE 3D T1w (BRAVO / SPGR). Verify regex against your GE data when you get some.

T1w.name: T1_by_protocol_token_fallback
T1w._comment: Last-resort match on series description. Only used if no rule above matched ANY series.

FLAIR.name: Siemens_3D_FLAIR_by_sequence_name
FLAIR._comment: Siemens 3D FLAIR uses SPACE inversion recovery. SequenceName contains spcir or spc_ir.

FLAIR.name: FLAIR_by_timing
FLAIR._comment: FLAIR has the most distinctive signature: TI ~2400ms only used to null CSF.

FLAIR.name: FLAIR_by_protocol_token_fallback
FLAIR._comment: Last-resort. Only used if no rule above matched ANY series.

selection._comment: Tiebreakers when multiple series in the same modality pass classification + gates. Lowest isotropy score (closest to 1mm isotropic) wins; then NORM in ImageType; then higher SeriesNumber.

output_layout._comment: Subject ID pattern (MRN+DOS) and MELD subject folder prefix. nnUNet dataset id and name are also configurable.
